snippets.src:
Definition a : nat :=
  let '(x, y) := (1, 2) in
  let ' (z, t) := (x, y) in
  let 'tt := tt in
  let fix f (x: nat) {struct x} : nat := x in
  (fun ' (f, x, y) => f (x + y)) (f, t, y).
Print a.

snippets.src:
Goal True \/ False.
  left. exact I.
Qed.

snippets.src:
Goal forall b: bool, b = b.
  destruct b; [ refine ?[true] | refine ?[false] ].
  all: reflexivity.
Qed.
snippets.rendered: io("coq", { sentence(code("Goal forall b: bool, b = b."), goal(none, none, code("forall b : bool, b = b"))); sentence(code("destruct b; [ refine ?[true] | refine ?[false] ]."), goal(txt("true"), none, code("true = true")) + goal(txt("false"), none, code("false = false"))); sentence(code("all: reflexivity."), none); sentence(code("Qed."), none) })
io("coq", { sentence(code("Definition double (n : nat) := n + n."), none) })
io("coq", { sentence(code("Check double."), message(txt("double\n     : nat -> nat"))); sentence(code("Compute double 21."), message(txt("= 42\n: nat"))) })

snippets.src:
Lemma add_0_r : forall n, n + 0 = n.
Proof.
  induction n.
  - reflexivity.
  - simpl. rewrite IHn. reflexivity.
Qed.
